headline.text: L3 ML1 glycol leak contaminated *three totes* of chocolate during belt maintenance — product scrapped, totes sent to wash.

summary: Three active holds: damaged Graham box at L2 Grinding, 2+ pallets unsealed jars at L1 S3, and ~6 pallets misdated boxes at L1 S2 (resolved via rework). L3 Matrix cross-contact: 2 mints found in milk truffle boxes.

holds.title: Unsealed jars held for rework
holds.summary: 2+ pallets (unknown exact count) of S3 jars not sealed by capper — held, will be re-run through sealing machine.
holds.status: On hold pending rework through capper.

holds.title: Damaged Graham box held
holds.summary: One box of Grahams on hold — outer box broken, possibly inner bag damaged from forklift forks.

holds.title: Misdated boxes reworked
holds.summary: ~6 pallets S2 boxes printed without date due to printer fault — held, reworked during shift, released.
holds.status: Resolved — date corrected, boxes reworked and released same shift.

food_safety.title: Glycol leak contaminated chocolate
food_safety.summary: ML1 C6 belt disassembled for replacement at 01:43; glycol leaked into three totes of chocolate — product scrapped, totes sent to wash bay.
food_safety.status: Product scrapped, totes decontaminated; line restarted 03:45 after belt replacement and ATP pass.

quality.title: Sealed pouches caught at load
quality.summary: S2 operators found 20 pre-sealed pouches during loading — screened out before filling, supplier feedback requested.
quality.status: Resolved — pouches removed, operations normal; QA tracking supplier lot.

sanitation.title: Dirty pin mold flagged
sanitation.summary: ML1 mold inspection found one pin mold with residue — flagged during routine check.
sanitation.status: Open — mold removed from circulation for cleaning.

allergen.title: Mints found in milk truffle boxes
allergen.summary: Matrix operator found 2 mint pieces inside milk truffle boxes during packing — cross-contact from adjacent product stream.
allergen.status: Open — team inspecting conveyor feed; no additional mints found as of window close.

opportunities.text: Add S3 capper verification to end-of-batch checklist — based on 2+ pallets unsealed jars discovered only at QA inspection.
Consider adding belt-removal glycol isolation step to ML1 maintenance checklist — based on today's leak during C6 replacement that contaminated three totes.
Review Matrix feed-conveyor product segregation — based on 2 mints in milk truffle boxes suggesting cross-contact at hopper stage.
